name: hungry-hungry-tippo
description: Starter full-stack agentic workflow example with Express, React, Material UI, Claude, and Postgres/pgvector.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @hhh/contracts && npm run build -w @hhh/api && npm run build -w @hhh/web
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @hhh/contracts && concurrently "npm run dev -w @hhh/api" "npm run dev -w @hhh/web"
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build -w @hhh/api && npm run test -w @hhh/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @hhh/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @hhh/api && npm run typecheck -w @hhh/web
